title.en: gPTP from Conformance to Application Interfaces: Requirements, Network Model, Concepts, and the ClockSource/ClockTarget APIs
title.zh: 从一致性到应用接口的 gPTP：要求、网络模型、概念与 ClockSource/ClockTarget 接口

blocks.en: This lesson walks the front matter of IEEE Std 802.1AS — the standard that distributes a common sense of time across a packet network so that time-sensitive applications (audio/video, industrial control, automotive) all agree on "now." The 802.1AS profile of timing is called gPTP (generalized Precision Time Protocol), a tightly constrained subset of IEEE 1588 PTP (Precision Time Protocol). We cover four clauses: Clause 5 (what an implementation must and may do), Clause 7 (the network-level time model), Clause 8 (the vocabulary), and Clause 9 (the software interfaces an application uses to read and steer time). The 802.1ASdr-2024 amendment is an inclusive-terminology revision: it renames the old roles — "master" becomes timeTransmitter, "slave" becomes timeReceiver, the BMCA (Best Master Clock Algorithm) becomes the BTCA (best timeTransmitter clock algorithm) — so you will see paired names like ClockMaster/ClockTimeTransmitter throughout.
blocks.zh: 本课讲解 IEEE Std 802.1AS 的开篇部分——这项标准在分组网络中分发统一的时间感知，使各类时间敏感应用（音视频、工业控制、汽车）对"此刻"达成一致。802.1AS 所采用的定时规范称为 gPTP（generalized Precision Time Protocol，广义精密时间协议），它是 IEEE 1588 PTP（Precision Time Protocol，精密时间协议）经过严格收紧的子集。我们覆盖四个章节：Clause 5（实现必须做什么、可以做什么）、Clause 7（网络级时间模型）、Clause 8（术语词汇）、Clause 9（应用读取与驱动时间所用的软件接口）。802.1ASdr-2024 修正案是一次包容性术语修订：它把旧角色重命名——"master" 改为 timeTransmitter，"slave" 改为 timeReceiver，BMCA（Best Master Clock Algorithm，最佳主时钟算法）改为 BTCA（best timeTransmitter clock algorithm）——所以全文你会看到 ClockMaster/ClockTimeTransmitter 这样的成对命名。

blocks.en: Mental model: a gPTP network elects one PTP Instance as the Grandmaster (the time source everyone follows), builds a synchronization spanning tree out from it, and then every other instance corrects for link delay and forwarding (residence) time so the leaves match the Grandmaster's clock. Clause 5 says who must be able to play which role; Clause 7 explains the election and tree; Clause 8 names the parts; Clause 9 is the API your application calls. About the paired names you will see: wherever the text writes ClockMasterClockTimeTransmitter, slavetimeReceiver, or BMCABTCA, read it as "old name → new name" (master→timeTransmitter, slave→timeReceiver, BMCA→BTCA). The mechanism is unchanged — only the words are.
blocks.zh: 思维模型：gPTP 网络选举出一个 PTP Instance（PTP 实例）作为 Grandmaster（大师时钟，即所有人跟随的时间源），从它向外构建一棵同步生成树，然后其余每个实例都修正链路时延与转发（驻留）时间，使叶子节点与 Grandmaster 的时钟对齐。Clause 5 规定谁必须能扮演哪个角色；Clause 7 解释选举与生成树；Clause 8 命名各组成部分；Clause 9 则是你的应用所调用的接口。关于你将看到的成对命名：凡文中写 ClockMasterClockTimeTransmitter、slavetimeReceiver 或 BMCABTCA，请读作"旧名 → 新名"（master→timeTransmitter，slave→timeReceiver，BMCA→BTCA）。机制不变——变的只是用词。

blocks.en: Clause 5 (Conformance) lists what a PTP Instance must implement and what is optional. 5.4.1 (Summary of requirements) makes mandatory the ClockSlave/ClockTimeReceiver sync state machine and the BTCA suite: on domain 0 the BTCA is the default with external port configuration off, while on other domains an implementation must support at least one of BTCA or externally configured port states. 5.4.2 (PTP Instance options) defines optional capabilities — the media-independent timeTransmitter ability (the state machines that send Announce and Sync), and the fuller Grandmaster-capable ability that layers the ClockTimeTransmitter send/offset/receive state machines on top. 5.4.3 (PTP Relay Instance requirements) says a relay (a bridge that passes time through) must support that same media-independent timeTransmitter capability. 5.6 (MAC-specific timing for IEEE 802.11) requires an 802.11 link to support at least one of the media-dependent timeTransmitter state machines or the media-dependent timeReceiver state machine.
blocks.zh: Clause 5（Conformance，一致性）列出 PTP Instance 必须实现什么、什么是可选的。5.4.1（Summary of requirements，要求摘要）将 ClockSlave/ClockTimeReceiver 同步状态机以及 BTCA 套件设为强制：在 domain 0（域 0）上 BTCA 是默认且关闭外部端口配置，而在其他域上实现必须至少支持 BTCA 与外部配置端口状态二者之一。5.4.2（PTP Instance options，实例选项）定义可选能力——媒体无关的 timeTransmitter 能力（发送 Announce 与 Sync 的状态机），以及在其上叠加 ClockTimeTransmitter 发送/偏移/接收状态机的更完整的 Grandmaster 能力。5.4.3（PTP Relay Instance requirements，中继实例要求）规定中继（透传时间的网桥）必须支持同样的媒体无关 timeTransmitter 能力。5.6（针对 IEEE 802.11 的 MAC 专属定时）要求 802.11 链路至少支持媒体相关 timeTransmitter 状态机或媒体相关 timeReceiver 状态机之一。

blocks.en: Clause 7 (Time-synchronization model for a packet network) describes the network as a whole. 7.2.2 covers a single gPTP domain: any clock-capable PTP Instance can be a potential Grandmaster, and the BTCA guarantees everyone picks the same one; if the path to the backbone Grandmaster fails, the local network falls back to the best local potential Grandmaster (e.g. one with a GNSS reference), splitting one domain into two. 7.2.3 extends this to multiple gPTP domains — each domain runs its own independent BTCA. 7.2.4 (redundancy) describes the standard's built-in failover: a detection component (loss of Sync/Announce messages or a downed link), a correction component (re-run the BTCA and send Announce), and an action component (the winner starts transmitting Sync and Announce, and everyone listens to it).
blocks.zh: Clause 7（分组网络的时间同步模型）从整体描述网络。7.2.2 讲单个 gPTP 域：任何具备时钟能力的 PTP Instance 都可成为潜在 Grandmaster，BTCA 保证所有人选中同一个；若通往骨干 Grandmaster 的路径失效，本地网络会回退到最佳本地潜在 Grandmaster（例如具有 GNSS 参考源的实例），从而把一个域分裂为两个。7.2.3 把这一点扩展到多个 gPTP 域——每个域运行各自独立的 BTCA。7.2.4（冗余）描述标准内置的故障切换：检测分量（Sync/Announce 报文丢失或链路断开）、纠正分量（重新运行 BTCA 并发送 Announce）、动作分量（胜出者开始发送 Sync 与 Announce，所有人转而监听它）。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[Grandmaster lost: Sync/Announce timeout] --> B[Detection]
  B --> C[Correction: re-run BTCA, send Announce]
  C --> D[Action: winner sends Sync + Announce]
  D --> E[All instances follow new Grandmaster]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[Grandmaster 丢失: Sync/Announce 超时] --> B[检测]
  B --> C[纠正: 重跑 BTCA, 发送 Announce]
  C --> D[动作: 胜出者发送 Sync + Announce]
  D --> E[所有实例跟随新的 Grandmaster]

blocks.en: 7.3.4 (Grandmaster selection and network establishment) explains the synchronization spanning tree: all PTP Instances take part in best-timeTransmitter selection, and the resulting sync tree can differ from the forwarding tree that RSTP (Rapid Spanning Tree Protocol) builds, because the RSTP tree may be suboptimal for timing. Crucially, gPTP only transfers time across time-aware systems; a non-time-aware bridge in the middle is detected via the peer-to-peer delay mechanism — if a Pdelay_Req gets no response, multiple responses, or a delay over threshold, the port is judged not gPTP-capable and the BTCA ignores it (while still periodically rechecking). 7.4 (PTP Instance architecture) splits an instance into a media-independent part — the ClockMaster/ClockTimeTransmitter, ClockSlave/ClockTimeReceiver, and SiteSync logical entities, one or more PortSync entities, and a LocalClock — plus media-dependent parts per port. 7.5 (differences from IEEE 1588) notes gPTP has only two instance types: PTP End Instance (≈ an 1588 Ordinary Clock) and PTP Relay Instance (a tightly defined 1588 Boundary Clock).
blocks.zh: 7.3.4（Grandmaster 选择与网络建立）解释同步生成树：所有 PTP Instance 都参与最佳 timeTransmitter 选择，得到的同步树可能不同于 RSTP（Rapid Spanning Tree Protocol，快速生成树协议）构建的转发树，因为 RSTP 树对定时而言可能并非最优。关键在于，gPTP 只在 time-aware（时间感知）系统之间传递时间；中途的非时间感知网桥通过 peer-to-peer 时延机制被识别——若 Pdelay_Req 得不到响应、收到多个响应或时延超过阈值，则该端口被判为不具备 gPTP 能力，BTCA 将忽略它（但仍周期性复查）。7.4（PTP Instance 架构）把实例分为媒体无关部分——ClockMaster/ClockTimeTransmitter、ClockSlave/ClockTimeReceiver 与 SiteSync 逻辑实体、一个或多个 PortSync 实体以及 LocalClock——加上每端口的媒体相关部分。7.5（与 IEEE 1588 的差异）指出 gPTP 只有两种实例类型：PTP End Instance（≈ 1588 普通时钟）与 PTP Relay Instance（受严格定义的 1588 边界时钟）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="20" width="440" height="110"/><line x1="10" y1="55" x2="450" y2="55"/><line x1="160" y1="55" x2="160" y2="130"/><line x1="300" y1="55" x2="300" y2="130"/><text x="230" y="40" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Media-independent part (ClockTimeTransmitter / ClockTimeReceiver / SiteSync / LocalClock)</text><text x="85" y="95" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PortSync</text><text x="230" y="95" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Media-dependent</text><text x="375" y="95" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">MD: PHY/MAC/ISS</text></svg>

caption.en: Figure 7-8 (simplified): a PTP Instance = one media-independent part (the time logic and BTCA) sitting over per-port media-dependent parts. The time-aware application talks to the media-independent part via the Clause 9 interfaces.
caption.zh: 图 7-8（简化）：一个 PTP Instance = 一个媒体无关部分（时间逻辑与 BTCA）位于各端口的媒体相关部分之上。时间感知应用通过 Clause 9 接口与媒体无关部分对话。

blocks.en: Clause 8 (Concepts and terminology) defines the building blocks. 8.4.3 (Generation of event message timestamps) explains why raw hardware timestamps must be corrected: timestamps are captured at a measurement plane offset from the true reference plane, and the offset differs for outbound vs inbound messages — so egressTimestamp = egressMeasuredTimestamp + egressLatency and ingressTimestamp = ingressMeasuredTimestamp − ingressLatency. 8.5.2 (Port identity) defines portNumber: value 0 is reserved for the interface between the ClockTimeTransmitter and ClockSource entities, and 0xFFFF is reserved. 8.6.1 (PTP Instance type) and 8.6.2 (PTP Instance attributes) define the comparison keys the BTCA uses: priority1, clockClass, clockAccuracy, offsetScaledLogVariance, priority2, and the informational timeSource — and for each, "lower numeric value is better" decides which instance wins.
blocks.zh: Clause 8（概念与术语）定义构件。8.4.3（事件报文时间戳的生成）解释为何原始硬件时间戳必须修正：时间戳是在与真正参考面（reference plane）有偏移的测量面（measurement plane）上采集的，且出向与入向报文的偏移不同——因此 egressTimestamp = egressMeasuredTimestamp + egressLatency，ingressTimestamp = ingressMeasuredTimestamp − ingressLatency。8.5.2（端口标识）定义 portNumber：值 0 保留给 ClockTimeTransmitter 与 ClockSource 实体之间的接口，0xFFFF 保留。8.6.1（PTP Instance 类型）与 8.6.2（PTP Instance 属性）定义 BTCA 所用的比较键：priority1、clockClass、clockAccuracy、offsetScaledLogVariance、priority2，以及信息性的 timeSource——对每一项，"数值越小越好"决定哪个实例胜出。

blocks.en: Clause 9 (Application interfaces) is the software-facing API. 9.1 (Overview) defines one interface between the ClockSource entity and the ClockTimeTransmitter (feeding time in) and four interfaces between the ClockTarget entity and the ClockTimeReceiver (reading time out). A ClockSource supplies external time to the domain; a ClockTarget is any application that consumes synchronized time. 9.2.1 (ClockSourceTime, General): the ClockSource calls ClockSourceTime.invoke to hand the ClockTimeTransmitter the time at the moment of invocation. 9.6.1/9.6.2 (ClockTargetPhaseDiscontinuity): the ClockTimeReceiver calls the .result function (in the SEND_SYNC_INDICATION block of the receiver-sync state machine) to tell the application whether a phase or frequency discontinuity occurred, tagged with its domainNumber.
blocks.zh: Clause 9（应用接口）是面向软件的 API。9.1（概览）定义了 ClockSource 实体与 ClockTimeTransmitter 之间的一个接口（喂入时间），以及 ClockTarget 实体与 ClockTimeReceiver 之间的四个接口（读出时间）。ClockSource 向域提供外部时间；ClockTarget 是任何消费同步时间的应用。9.2.1（ClockSourceTime，总则）：ClockSource 调用 ClockSourceTime.invoke，把调用时刻的时间交给 ClockTimeTransmitter。9.6.1/9.6.2（ClockTargetPhaseDiscontinuity）：ClockTimeReceiver 在接收同步状态机的 SEND_SYNC_INDICATION 块中调用 .result 函数，告知应用是否发生了相位或频率不连续，并带上其 domainNumber。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  CS[ClockSource] -->|ClockSourceTime.invoke| TT[ClockTimeTransmitter]
  TR[ClockTimeReceiver] -->|EventCapture.result| CT[ClockTarget]
  CT -->|TriggerGenerate.invoke| TR
  TR -->|ClockGenerator.result| CT
  TR -->|PhaseDiscontinuity.result| CT
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  CS[ClockSource] -->|ClockSourceTime.invoke| TT[ClockTimeTransmitter]
  TR[ClockTimeReceiver] -->|EventCapture.result| CT[ClockTarget]
  CT -->|TriggerGenerate.invoke| TR
  TR -->|ClockGenerator.result| CT
  TR -->|PhaseDiscontinuity.result| CT

summary.en: Coverage map — the three ClockTarget interfaces in detail (9.3 capture, 9.4 trigger, 9.5 clock-gen)
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——三个 ClockTarget 接口详解（9.3 捕获、9.4 触发、9.5 时钟生成）

blocks.en:
9.3 ClockTargetEventCapture — read the time of an event. 9.3.1 (General): the ClockTarget calls EventCapture.invoke to signal an event; the ClockTimeReceiver replies with EventCapture.result giving the event time relative to the current Grandmaster Clock (or the LocalClock if no instance is grandmaster-capable), plus gmPresent. 9.3.2 (invoke parameters): 9.3.2.1 domainNumber (UInteger8) names the receiver domain. 9.3.3 (result parameters): the result carries domainNumber, slavetimeReceiverTimeCallback (the synchronized time the invoke happened), and gmPresent.

9.4 ClockTargetTriggerGenerate — fire an output at a future time. 9.4.1 (General): the ClockTarget asks the receiver to emit a result at a specified synchronized time. 9.4.2 (invoke parameters): domainNumber plus slavetimeReceiverTimeCallback — if nonzero it is the target time; if zero it cancels a pending request. 9.4.3 (result parameters): domainNumber and errorCondition (Boolean) — TRUE if the requested time is already past or was skipped by a discontinuity. 9.4.4 (interface definition): the receiver stores the requested time and fires .result with errorCondition=FALSE when synchronized time (or LocalClock if gmPresent is FALSE) reaches it.

9.5 ClockTargetClockGenerator — produce a periodic clock. 9.5.1 (General): request a periodic signal of given period and phase. 9.5.2 (invoke parameters): domainNumber, clockPeriod, and slavetimeReceiverTimeCallbackPhase — result invocations occur at synchronized times equal to the phase plus n×clockPeriod. 9.5.3 (result parameters): domainNumber and slavetimeReceiverTimeCallback (the synchronized time of each tick).
blocks.zh:
9.3 ClockTargetEventCapture——读取事件发生的时间。9.3.1（总则）：ClockTarget 调用 EventCapture.invoke 标记一个事件；ClockTimeReceiver 用 EventCapture.result 回复该事件相对当前 Grandmaster Clock 的时间（若无实例具备 grandmaster 能力则相对 LocalClock），并附带 gmPresent。9.3.2（invoke 参数）：9.3.2.1 domainNumber（UInteger8）指明接收方域。9.3.3（result 参数）：结果携带 domainNumber、slavetimeReceiverTimeCallback（invoke 发生时的同步时间）与 gmPresent。

9.4 ClockTargetTriggerGenerate——在未来某时刻触发输出。9.4.1（总则）：ClockTarget 请求接收方在指定同步时间发出一个结果。9.4.2（invoke 参数）：domainNumber 加 slavetimeReceiverTimeCallback——非零即目标时间，为零则取消挂起请求。9.4.3（result 参数）：domainNumber 与 errorCondition（布尔）——若所请求的时间已过去或被不连续跳过则为 TRUE。9.4.4（接口定义）：接收方存储请求时间，当同步时间（gmPresent 为 FALSE 时为 LocalClock）到达时以 errorCondition=FALSE 触发 .result。

9.5 ClockTargetClockGenerator——产生周期时钟。9.5.1（总则）：请求给定周期与相位的周期信号。9.5.2（invoke 参数）：domainNumber、clockPeriod 与 slavetimeReceiverTimeCallbackPhase——结果调用发生在等于相位加 n×clockPeriod 的同步时间。9.5.3（result 参数）：domainNumber 与 slavetimeReceiverTimeCallback（每个时钟沿的同步时间）。

summary.en: Coverage map — Clause 5 conformance and Clause 7/8 model & concepts (exact subclauses)
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——Clause 5 一致性与 Clause 7/8 模型及概念（精确子条款）

blocks.en: Clause 5: 5.4.1 (summary of requirements — mandatory ClockTimeReceiver sync machine + BTCA suite, default BTCA on domain 0), 5.4.2 (instance options — media-independent timeTransmitter and Grandmaster-capable abilities), 5.4.3 (PTP Relay Instance must support the media-independent timeTransmitter capability), 5.6 (IEEE 802.11 MAC must support a media-dependent timeTransmitter or timeReceiver state machine). Clause 7: 7.2.2 (single domain + Grandmaster fallback), 7.2.3 (multiple domains, independent BTCA each), 7.2.4 (redundancy = detection + correction + action), 7.3.4 (synchronization spanning tree vs RSTP forwarding tree; non-time-aware node detection via peer-to-peer delay), 7.4 (instance architecture: media-independent SiteSync/PortSync/LocalClock + media-dependent ports), 7.5 (two instance types only: PTP End Instance and PTP Relay Instance vs the four 1588 clock types). Clause 8: 8.4.3 (timestamp egress/ingress latency correction), 8.5.2 (port identity — portNumber 0 reserved for ClockSource interface, 0xFFFF reserved), 8.6.1 (instance type), 8.6.2 (instance attributes: priority1, clockClass, clockAccuracy, offsetScaledLogVariance, priority2, timeSource — lower value wins).
blocks.zh: Clause 5：5.4.1（要求摘要——强制 ClockTimeReceiver 同步机 + BTCA 套件，domain 0 默认 BTCA），5.4.2（实例选项——媒体无关 timeTransmitter 与 Grandmaster 能力），5.4.3（PTP Relay Instance 必须支持媒体无关 timeTransmitter 能力），5.6（IEEE 802.11 MAC 必须支持媒体相关 timeTransmitter 或 timeReceiver 状态机）。Clause 7：7.2.2（单域 + Grandmaster 回退），7.2.3（多域，各自独立 BTCA），7.2.4（冗余 = 检测 + 纠正 + 动作），7.3.4（同步生成树 vs RSTP 转发树；通过 peer-to-peer 时延检测非时间感知节点），7.4（实例架构：媒体无关 SiteSync/PortSync/LocalClock + 媒体相关端口），7.5（仅两种实例类型：PTP End Instance 与 PTP Relay Instance，对比 1588 的四种时钟）。Clause 8：8.4.3（时间戳出向/入向时延修正），8.5.2（端口标识——portNumber 0 保留给 ClockSource 接口，0xFFFF 保留），8.6.1（实例类型），8.6.2（实例属性：priority1、clockClass、clockAccuracy、offsetScaledLogVariance、priority2、timeSource——数值越小越优）。

cites.note: Clause 5.4.1-5.4.3 PTP Instance requirements/options/relay; 5.6 IEEE 802.11 MAC-specific timing
Clause 7.2.2-7.2.4 network architecture & redundancy; 7.3.4 Grandmaster selection & sync tree; 7.4 instance architecture; 7.5 gPTP vs 1588
Clause 8.4.3 timestamp generation; 8.5.2 port identity; 8.6.1-8.6.2 instance type & attributes
Clause 9.1-9.6 application interfaces: ClockSourceTime, EventCapture, TriggerGenerate, ClockGenerator, PhaseDiscontinuity
